gmap.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This declares a ~m:Google Map~ variable. See ~l:create~.

erstelle.description:
[Übersetzung in Arbeit] 1. Creates a new ~l:gmap!Google Map~ in the specified ~l:div|k|browser~.

2. Creates a new ~l:marker~ in the specified ~l:gmap!Google Map~.
erstelle.examples:
erstelle Map in MapContainer
create Marker in Map

marke.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This declares a ~m:marker~ variable. See ~l:create~.%0a%0aA ~m:marker~ is a map pin. You can specify the color of the pin and its title using ~l:set~.

auf.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Handles events of various kinds arising from ~l:gmap!Google Maps~ and ~l:marker!markers~.%0a%0a~m:click~ : a click in the map or marker%0a%0a~m:move~ : the map was moved by the user%0a%0a~m:type~ : the map type was changed, e.g. roadmap or satellite%0a%0a~m:zoom~ : the zoom level was changed by the user%0a
auf.examples: auf zoom Map gehe zu MapUpdate%0aauf klick Marker gehe zu ShowInfo

entferne.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Removes all the ~l:marker!markers~ from the ~l:gmap!Google Map~.

setze.syntax: setze [der/die/das/den/dem/des] schlüssel/schluessel/taste von {gmap} zu {value}%0asetze [der/die/das/den/dem/des] breitengrad/längengrad/laengengrad/zoom/typ von {gmap} zu {value}%0asetze [der/die/das/den/dem/des] titel von {marker} zu {value}%0asetze [der/die/das/den/dem/des] label von {marker} zu {value}%0asetze [der/die/das/den/dem/des] position von {marker} zu {value}%0asetze [der/die/das/den/dem/des] farbe von {marker} zu {value}
setze.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Sets various attributes of ~l:gmap!Google Maps~ and ~l:marker!markers~.%0a%0a~m:sets the key~ is needed for maps to work at all. API Keys are issued by Google and permit a large allowance of free usage per day before any charges apply. If possible, do not include the key directly in your script as others could then make free use of it. Instead, put it on your server and get it using a REST endpoint. Alternatively, go to your Google Developer Console and specify which URLs should be associated with the key, making it unusable anywhere else.%0a%0aThe ~m:position~ of a ~l:marker~ is a JSON string containing latitude and longitude properties, as for example:%0a%0a~m:{~dq~latitude~dq~:~dq~53.8291119~dq~,~dq~longitude~dq~:~dq~-1.5381586~dq~}~
setze.examples: setze der/die/das/den/dem/des schlüssel/schluessel/taste von Map zu APIKey%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des breitengrad von Map zu `44.277691`%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des längengrad/laengengrad von Map zu `-0.78228`%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des zoom von Map zu `14.2`%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des typ von Map zu `roadmap`%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des titel von Marker zu `Post Office`%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des label von Marker zu `O`%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des position von Marker zu CurrentPosition%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des farbe von {marker} zu `#ff0`

zeige.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Shows a ~l:gmap!Google Map~, that is, makes it visible. Called after ~l:create~.

aktualisiere.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Updates a ~l:gmap!Google Map~ after changes have been made by the script that affect how it should be displayed.

klick position.syntax: [der/die/das/den/dem/des] klick position von {gmap}%0a[der/die/das/den/dem/des] breitengrad/längengrad/laengengrad/zoom/typ/grenzen von {gmap}%0a[der/die/das/den/dem/des] breitengrad/längengrad/laengengrad/titel von {marker}
klick position.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] 1. Gets the position where the user clicked the map. This is a JSON value that holds both latitude and longitude. It can be fed directly into ~l:set|k!set the position of {gmap}~.%0a%0a2. Gets the latitude, longitude, zoom, type or bounds of a ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~. ~m:bounds~ is a JSON value with properties ~m:north~, ~m:south~, ~m:east~ and ~m:west~. The website [Here On The Map](https://hereonthemap.com) uses these to search its database for markers located within the bounds of the map.%0a%0a3. Gets an attribute of a ~l:marker~.
klick position.examples: lege der/die/das/den/dem/des klick position von Map in Position%0alege der/die/das/den/dem/des bound von Map in Bounds%0alege der/die/das/den/dem/des titel von Marker in PinName

breitengrad.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Gets the latitude of the center of a ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~ or the position of a ~l:marker|k~.
breitengrad.examples: lege der/die/das/den/dem/des breitengrad von Map in MapLat%0alege der/die/das/den/dem/des breitengrad von Marker in MarkerLatitude

längengrad/laengengrad.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Gets the longitude of the center of a ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~ or the position of a ~l:marker|k~.
längengrad/laengengrad.examples: lege der/die/das/den/dem/des längengrad/laengengrad von Map in MapLng%0alege der/die/das/den/dem/des längengrad/laengengrad von Marker in MarkerLongitude

typ.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Gets the type (~m:roadmap~ or ~m:satellite~) of a ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~.
typ.examples: lege der/die/das/den/dem/des typ von Map in MapType

titel.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Gets the title of a ~l:marker|k~.
titel.examples: lege der/die/das/den/dem/des titel von Marker in Title

grenzen.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Gets the bounds of a ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~. ~m:bounds~ is a JSON value with properties ~m:north~, ~m:south~, ~m:east~ and ~m:west~. The website [Here On The Map](https://hereonthemap.com) uses these to search its database for markers located within the bounds of the map. See ~l:on|k!on click~ and ~l:click position!the click position~.%0a
grenzen.examples: lege der/die/das/den/dem/des grenzen von Map in Bounds

zoom.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Gets the current zoom level for the ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~.
zoom.examples: lege der/die/das/den/dem/des zoom von Map in Zoom

gmap.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Defines a map variable. See also ~l:create~.

marke.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Defines a marker - a pin on the map. See also ~l:gmap~ and ~l:create~

erstelle.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Creates a map or a marker. See ~l:gmap~ and ~l:marker~.
erstelle.examples: erstelle MyMap in MapDiv%0aerstelle Marker in MyMap

auf.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Handle an event arising in a map or a marker.%0aA click event occurs when the user clicks the map or a marker on the map.%0aA move event occurs when the map is dragged.%0aA type event occurs when the type of the map is changed, e.g. from roadmap to satellite.%0aA zoom event occurs when the user zooms in or out of the map.%0a%0aSee ~l:gmap~, ~l:marker~ and ~l:set~.
auf.examples: auf klick MyMap goto ...%0aauf klick Marker goto ...%0aauf bewege MyMap goto ...%0aauf typ MyMap goto ...%0aauf zoom MyMap goto ...

entferne.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This removes all markers from the map. See also ~l:map~, ~l:marker~ and ~l:create~.

setze.syntax: setze [der/die/das/den/dem/des] schlüssel/schluessel/taste/breitengrad/längengrad/laengengrad/typ/zoom von {map} zu {value}%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des titel/position/farbe von {marker} zu {value}
setze.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Sets an attribute of a ~l:map~ or of a ~l:marker~. Map attributes are key, latitude, longitude, type and zoom; marker attributes are title, position and color.%0a%0aThe ~sq~key~sq~ of a map is a code supplied by Google that authorizes use of the map on any given website. A key may apply to all websites or just to specific ones. Visit the Google Developer Console to request a key. You will need a Google account to do this but there are no costs until the usage of your maps becomes quite large.%0a%0aLatitude and longitude are that of the center of a map.%0a%0aThe Type of a map is as defined by Google, e.g. ~sq~roadmap~sq~ or ~sq~satellite~sq~.%0a%0aThe Zoom of a map is a decimal value that ranges from very wide angle (0) through to fully zoomed in (2 or 22).%0a%0aThe Title of a marker is displayed when the mouse hovers over it. (on a PC, of course; on a mobile there is no hover).%0a%0aThe Position of a marker is a JSON string containing 2 decimal properties; latitude and longitude. For example:%0a%0a{~dq~latitude~dq~:~dq~`53.8291119`~dq~,~dq~longitude~dq~:~dq~-1.5381586~dq~}%0a%0aThe Color of a marker is a standard CSS color e.g. `pink` or `#ff63a9`.%0a%0aSee also ~l:map~ and ~l:marker~.
setze.examples: setze der/die/das/den/dem/des schlüssel/schluessel/taste von MyMap zu `YOUR_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY`%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des breitengrad von MyMap zu `53.8291119`%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des längengrad/laengengrad von MyMap to`-1.5381586`%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des zoom von MyMap zu `17.0`%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des titel von Marker zu `Central Library`%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des position von Marker zu Position%0asetze der/die/das/den/dem/des farbe von Marker zu `#c5e`

zeige.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Make the newly-created map visible. See also ~l:map~ and ~l:create~.
